title: Extracting Product Features from a Technical Specification
scenario: Create a prompt that extracts product features (CPU, RAM, Storage, and Display) from a technical specification, assuming it's a plain text document with the following format: ... The output should be a JSON object with each product feature as a separate key. The prompt should be under 100 words and use an informal tone. There will be at least 5 product features.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt is under 100 words and uses an informal tone.
Check if the JSON syntax is valid and correctly formatted.
Check if the extracted product features are accurately extracted from the given technical specification.
